description_long: This is a red Onewheel hoverboard with a single large central wheel encased in a rounded fender. The deck consists of two rectangular footpads, one on each side of the wheel, with textured surfaces for grip and visible wear from use. The front footpad features a raised black sensor area and is adorned with two white and red stickers, adding a personalized touch. The side of the fender displays the 'ONEWHEEL+' branding in white, and the overall construction appears robust, with a combination of metal, plastic, and rubber materials. The wheel is thick and rugged, suitable for urban terrain, and the device shows signs of outdoor use, such as scuffs and dirt. No visible lighting or control interfaces are present, and the design is streamlined for standing riders.
description: A red Onewheel hoverboard with a central wheel, textured footpads, and visible stickers and branding. The device is rugged and designed for urban riding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red fender, two stickers, and the raised black sensor area on the front footpad.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the large central wheel, 'ONEWHEEL+' branding, and the full length of both footpads.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back footpad with a textured surface and the rear of the fender, with less visible decoration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the central wheel, fender, and the VR marking, with a clear look at the footpad surfaces.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Single large central wheel, rubber tire, encased in a rounded fender, positioned between two footpads.
attribute_footpad_design: Two rectangular footpads, one front and one rear, with textured, grippy surfaces. The front pad has a raised black sensor area and visible wear. Both pads are wide enough for adult feet and have slight edge contours for stability.
attribute_brand_logo: Branding 'ONEWHEEL+' in white on the side of the fender; two decorative stickers on the front footpad.
